title: Turtle Totems
description: Totems are boring. Now, they are turtles!
body:
**With this resource pack, totems will become turtles.**

**This will work on most modern versions of Minecraft. If it says it's for an older version, it will still work; just click enable anyway.**
## Important:
- This resource pack **_should work on most modern versions of Minecraft, even if it says it's from an older version._**
- Compatible with most other resource packs; only changes the texture of the totem.
- The resource pack is lightweight and only contains only one new texture.

**If you're enjoying this mod, please also try [Turtle HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/turtle-hud/)!**
